response.original_title: Iowa Vet: Dogs, Cats, Corn, & Murder
response.overview: A veterinarian reflects on growing up on an Iowa farm, building an animal hospital in the big city, confronting the upheavals transforming his profession, and navigating the unexpected chapters - Murders, Mormons, a Modern Family - that helped shape his life.
response.title: Iowa Vet: Dogs, Cats, Corn, & Murder
